Featured • Case Study 12 Jan 2026 • 4 min read

We Recovered This Law Firm From Ransomware in 2 Hours (Saturday 2am Attack, Monday 9am Back Online)

Crypto-locker encrypted their Pastel + documents. No tested backup. Last IT said “pay Bitcoin”. We found shadow copy + M365 versioning + isolated NAS backup. Here’s exact steps, so you can check if you would survive same attack.

Ransomware Backup Test Law Firm
Read Full Story → Check If You’re at Risk (R950)

What saved them

  • ✓ M365 versioning kept 30d of files despite ransomware sync
  • ✓ NAS with immutable snapshot (we had set up 3 months earlier)
  • ✓ We had tested restore the week before (restore report)
  • ✗ No EDR, no Safe Attachments — entry via fake invoice .zip
Lesson

OneDrive alone is not backup. Need immutable + offline + tested. Cost to recover: R9,500 vs R250k+ ransom. Call 076 948 9154 to test yours.
